definitions.name: Text above variant
definitions.description: Short product text displayed above the variant picker (Taille).

definitions.name: Product badges
definitions.description: Badge labels shown above the product title (e.g. UNIFIE, PROTÈGE).

definitions.name: Certification line
definitions.description: Yuka / INCI certification text below the title.

definitions.name: Stock message
definitions.description: Delivery/stock text below the Add to cart button.

definitions.name: Description accordion
definitions.description: Rich text for the Description accordion. Falls back to native product description if empty.

definitions.name: Description image
definitions.description: Optional image shown inside the Description accordion.

definitions.name: Benefits accordion
definitions.description: Rich text for the Bienfaits accordion.

definitions.name: Key ingredients accordion
definitions.description: Rich text for the Ingrédients clés accordion.

definitions.name: Skin types accordion
definitions.description: Rich text for the Adapté aux peaux accordion.
